narrative:
Precinct Harrison Township (precinct in Vinton County) has 663 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.8 percentage points.
